SELECT [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[SKU], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [t].[WarrantyDays], [t].[IsActive], [t].[CreatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[IsActive], [p].[Name], [p].[SKU], [p].[WarrantyDays]
    FROM [Product] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC

2026-05-04 12:54:01.832 +05:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (16ms) [Parameters=[@__companyId_0='?' (DbType = Int32), @__productId_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='120']
SELECT [t].[ProductId], [t].[Name], [t].[SKU], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[Name0], [t].[WarrantyDays], [t].[Description], [t].[IsActive], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CategoryId0], [t0].[ColorId], [t0].[Name], [t0].[HexCode], [t0].[ProductId], [t0].[ColorId0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[ProductId], [p].[Name], [p].[SKU], [p].[CategoryId], [c].[Name] AS [Name0], [p].[WarrantyDays], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[CreatedAt], [c].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0]
    FROM [Product] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0 AND [p].[ProductId] = @__productId_1
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (

SELECT [t].[BatchId], [t].[BatchNo], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [t].[ProductionDate], [t].[Quantity], [t].[Status], [t].[CreatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[ProductId], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [t].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[ProductId], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status]
    FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC

) AS [t]

SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId] AND [p3].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [DispatchedQty]
FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId] AND [p3].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [DispatchedQty]
FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]

    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId] AND [p3].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [DispatchedQty]
FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]
INNER JOIN [Product] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchId], [p].[BatchNo], [p].[ProductId], [p0].[Name] AS [ProductName], [c].[Name] AS [CategoryName], [p].[ProductionDate], [p].[Quantity], [p].[Status], [p].[CreatedAt], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)

INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p1]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p1].[BatchId]) AS bigint) AS [GeneratedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p2]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p2].[BatchId] AND [p2].[PrintStatus] = N'Printed') AS bigint) AS [PrintedQty], CAST((
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [ProductItem] AS [p3]
    WHERE [p].[BatchId] = [p3].[BatchId] AND [p3].[Status] = N'Dispatched') AS bigint) AS [DispatchedQty]
FROM [ProductionBatch] AS [p]

INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]

    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsActive], [p].[ModelNo], [p].[Name], [p].[SKU], [p].[WarrantyDays]
    FROM [Product] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[CompanyId] = @__companyId_0
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[ColorId], [c0].[Name], [c0].[HexCode], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[ColorId] AS [ColorId0]
    FROM [ProductColor] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN [Color] AS [c0] ON [p0].[ColorId] = [c0].[ColorId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId] = [t0].[ProductId]
